meta.task: Assess Shanghai street-vitality drivers using prepared data canvas with LBS activity data and population attributes

nodes.title: All-window aggregate LBS vitality
nodes.status_reason: Main outcome branch; data ready; baseline association model

required_parameters.people_proxy: aggregated device-user count, not census population

time_space_people.time: 7-day aggregate; no diurnal or weekday/weekend differentiation

nodes.claim_boundary: Can support descriptive association between built environment and aggregate activity intensity. Cannot support individual behavior, causal effect, or temporal heterogeneity claims.
review_risks: Weekend vs weekday patterns may differ
No population-profile breakdown

artifacts.title: Study area locator map (two-panel publication layout)
Study area locator map artifact note

review_records.time_implications: Outcome reflects 7-day aggregate; weekday/weekend contrast based on 5 vs 2 days
review_records.space_implications: 516 grid cells cover AOI; no islands in weights
review_records.claim_impact: VIF>10 and r>0.7 noted; proceed with tree-based model

nodes.title: Weekday/weekend vitality contrast
nodes.status_reason: Completed comparison branch feeding RC_01; not main path

required_parameters.people_proxy: aggregated device-user count by day type

time_space_people.time: Weekday vs weekend; only one weekend in the 7-day window (2 days vs 5 days)

nodes.claim_boundary: Can describe weekday/weekend spatial differences in aggregate activity. Cannot generalize beyond the single weekend observed. Cannot attribute differences to built environment without modeling.
review_risks: Only one weekend (2 days) vs 5 weekdays
Small sample for weekend pattern stability

review_records.time_implications: Outcome reflects 7-day aggregate; weekday/weekend contrast based on 5 vs 2 days
review_records.space_implications: 516 grid cells cover AOI; no islands in weights
review_records.claim_impact: VIF>10 and r>0.7 noted; proceed with tree-based model

nodes.title: Day-period vitality (morning/day/evening/night)
nodes.status_reason: Deferred by user; can be activated later

time_space_people.time: Four periods across 7 days; period definitions fixed by data provider

nodes.claim_boundary: Can describe diurnal spatial variation in aggregate activity. Cannot infer land-use function from period intensity alone.
review_risks: Period definitions are fixed and may not match local commuting patterns
Night period may have sparse data in some grids

review_records.time_implications: Outcome reflects 7-day aggregate; weekday/weekend contrast based on 5 vs 2 days
review_records.space_implications: 516 grid cells cover AOI; no islands in weights
review_records.claim_impact: VIF>10 and r>0.7 noted; proceed with tree-based model

nodes.title: Population-profile aware vitality aggregation
nodes.status_reason: Deferred: raw UUID join not prepared; privacy risk
required_inputs: raw LBS stay records (uuid, grid, time)

required_parameters.aggregation_rule: group by grid + attribute category, suppress if count < 5

time_space_people.people: social-attribute breakdown of sampled device users, not census population

nodes.claim_boundary: Can describe association between built environment and device-user attribute composition. Cannot claim general population demographics. Sampling bias (device ownership, app usage) must be stated.
review_risks: UUID-to-grid join requires raw stay records not in canvas
Privacy suppression may leave many grids with missing data
Sampling bias of LBS panel unknown

review_records.time_implications: Outcome reflects 7-day aggregate; weekday/weekend contrast based on 5 vs 2 days
review_records.space_implications: 516 grid cells cover AOI; no islands in weights
review_records.claim_impact: VIF>10 and r>0.7 noted; proceed with tree-based model

nodes.title: Built-form baseline variables
nodes.claim_boundary: Built-form association candidates. Not causal. CMAB attributes are source-derived, not validated on the ground.
review_risks: CMAB data is from 2020; may not reflect 2024 conditions
Collinearity among density/coverage/height

review_records.time_implications: Outcome reflects 7-day aggregate; weekday/weekend contrast based on 5 vs 2 days
review_records.space_implications: 516 grid cells cover AOI; no islands in weights
review_records.claim_impact: VIF>10 and r>0.7 noted; proceed with tree-based model

nodes.title: Activity-opportunity variables (POI + road)
nodes.claim_boundary: POI and road density are opportunity proxies. Cannot equate POI count with actual visitation or economic activity.
review_risks: OSM completeness varies by area
POI type entropy may be noisy for low-count grids

review_records.time_implications: Outcome reflects 7-day aggregate; weekday/weekend contrast based on 5 vs 2 days
review_records.space_implications: 516 grid cells cover AOI; no islands in weights
review_records.claim_impact: VIF>10 and r>0.7 noted; proceed with tree-based model

nodes.title: Accessibility / connectivity add-on
nodes.status_reason: Deferred by user; requires GIS processing

required_parameters.alignment: requires road-network processing from OSM roads

nodes.claim_boundary: Accessibility metrics are network-structure proxies. Not pedestrian-level accessibility without sidewalk data.
review_risks: Requires additional GIS processing
May be highly correlated with road_density

review_records.time_implications: Outcome reflects 7-day aggregate; weekday/weekend contrast based on 5 vs 2 days
review_records.space_implications: 516 grid cells cover AOI; no islands in weights
review_records.claim_impact: VIF>10 and r>0.7 noted; proceed with tree-based model

nodes.title: Full multimodal package (built-form + opportunity + accessibility)
nodes.status_reason: Deferred by user; high collinearity risk without review
nodes.claim_boundary: Combined association model. Individual variable effects are not independently causal due to collinearity.
review_risks: High collinearity risk between density and accessibility
Model interpretation requires regularization or decomposition

review_records.time_implications: Outcome reflects 7-day aggregate; weekday/weekend contrast based on 5 vs 2 days
review_records.space_implications: 516 grid cells cover AOI; no islands in weights
review_records.claim_impact: VIF>10 and r>0.7 noted; proceed with tree-based model

nodes.title: Random Forest baseline (all-window + built-form + opportunity)
nodes.status_reason: Existing baseline model; use as-is then review residuals
nodes.claim_boundary: Association model only. Already run: cv_r2=0.493, cv_mae=0.508. Not causal.
review_risks: No spatial diagnostics
No residual autocorrelation check

nodes.title: GWRF spatial heterogeneity model
nodes.status_reason: Blocked: local multicollinearity exceeded threshold (50.2% windows with condition number >= 30)

required_parameters.bandwidth: adaptive or fixed; to be determined by AICc or CV
required_parameters.coordinate_basis: grid centroids in projected CRS (EPSG:3857 or UTM 51N)
required_parameters.local_diagnostics: local R2, local residuals, local coefficient maps, local prediction/importance
required_parameters.validation: spatial cross-validation or leave-one-out by distance

time_space_people.space: 500m grid; local coefficients per cell; projected coordinates required
time_space_people.people: spatially varying association, not local causal effect

nodes.claim_boundary: Can describe spatially varying associations. Cannot claim local causal effects without stronger design.
review_risks: Bandwidth choice strongly affects results
Multicollinearity in local windows
Small n=516 for local estimation

nodes.title: SHAP / PDP model explanation
nodes.status_reason: SHAP/PDP explanation completed on fitted RF model
nodes.claim_boundary: Explanations are model-dependent. SHAP values describe the fitted model, not ground-truth causal effects.
review_risks: Correlated features can produce misleading SHAP attributions

nodes.title: Residual spatial autocorrelation check
nodes.status_reason: Residual check completed; Moran's I=0.191 significant
nodes.claim_boundary: If significant, suggests missing spatial variables or need for spatial model.
review_risks: Significant Moran's I would motivate GWRF branch

review_records.time_implications: Residual spatial structure may reflect unmeasured temporal or historical factors
review_records.space_implications: Moran's I=0.191 significant; spatial model warranted but blocked by multicollinearity
review_records.people_implications: Unexplained spatial clusters may correspond to unobserved activity generators
review_records.claim_impact: GWRF branch blocked; RF remains primary model

nodes.title: Outcome and feature package comparison
nodes.status_reason: Route comparison completed with all approved branches
nodes.claim_boundary: Comparison is evidence-calibration, not model selection for causal inference.
review_risks: Different outcomes are not nested; comparison is descriptive

nodes.title: Final claim synthesis
nodes.claim_boundary: Final claims must respect all upstream claim boundaries.
review_risks: Overclaiming is the main risk

memory_retrieval_log.query: Shanghai street vitality drivers research design

reflections.worker_reflection: S1 and S2 workers produced clean artifacts on first attempt. S4 residual worker correctly used CV predictions and queen contiguity. S4 explanation worker noted collinearity caveats appropriately. S3 GWRF worker correctly aborted on local multicollinearity check rather than producing unreliable coefficients.
reflections.reviewer_reflection: Plan review approved descriptive-association scope. S1/S2 reviewer noted VIF/correlation warnings. Residual reviewer confirmed Moran's I significance and recommended GWRF branch activation. GWRF requirements review correctly blocked the branch. No independent reviewer was delegated for S4 explanation artifacts — this is a gap.
reflections.main_reflection: The workflow successfully navigated from plan gate through claim synthesis with 5 delegated workers. Key decision points: human approved RO_01+RO_02 and FP_01+FP_02; residual autocorrelation triggered GWRF branch; GWRF blocked by local multicollinearity; final claims calibrated to 'stable' and 'conditional' levels only. Missing: independent reviewer for SHAP/PDP artifacts; QGIS workspace packaging; spatial reasoning manifest.
memory_carryover: Shanghai inner-ring 500m grid: 516 cells, CMAB 2020 + OSM + LBS 7-day panel
RF baseline cv_r2=0.49; residual Moran's I=0.19 significant
GWRF blocked at bandwidth=150 due to 50% windows with condition number>=30
Core predictors: building_coverage_ratio, poi_type_entropy (top by SHAP and permutation)
